sections.subtitle: Recent Form
sections.text: Como have shown strong form in their last 5 matches, securing 2 wins, including a convincing 3-0 victory over Lecce, though they suffered heavy losses against top sides like Inter (4-0). Udinese, on the other hand, have struggled, managing only 1 win in their last 5, with a notable 5-1 defeat to Fiorentina highlighting defensive frailties.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Record
sections.text: In the last two head-to-head encounters, Como dominated the most recent match with a 4-1 win at home in January 2025, while Udinese narrowly won 1-0 in their earlier meeting in September 2024. This suggests Como might have the upper hand at home.

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics
sections.text: Como, sitting 6th with 27 points, boast a solid defense (12 goals conceded, 2nd fewest in the league) and high ball possession (60%, 1st in the league). Udinese, 11th with 22 points, have struggled defensively, conceding 28 goals, one of the highest in the league, which could be exploited by Como's attack led by Nico Paz (6 goals, 6 assists).

sections.subtitle: Key Players and Absences
sections.text: Como's Nico Paz is in fine form, contributing 2 goals and 2 assists in the last 5 matches, though they miss key forward Álvaro Morata. Udinese rely on Keinan Davis (5 goals) for firepower but lack standout performers recently and miss important midfielder Arthur Atta.

sections.subtitle: Match Outlook
sections.text: Given Como's superior league position, home advantage, and recent head-to-head dominance, coupled with Udinese's poor defensive record and inconsistent form, the Sofascore prediction of a 65% chance of a home win seems justified. Expect Como to control possession and create more chances.
